29#include "pinocchio.h"
30
31/* This routine reads in a white noise field as generated by GRAFIC2
32 and adds the correct power */
33
34// TUTTO DA RIVERIFICARE!!!
35
36#ifdef WHITENOISE
37
38int read_white_noise()
39{
40 int dummy,np1,np2,np3,seed,Ninplane,gz,lx,ly,lz,Task,i;
41 int local_x,local_y,local_z,ixx,iyy,izz,index,nxhalf,nyhalf,nzhalf;
42 size_t planesize;
43 float *plane;
44 double kx,ky,kz,kxnorm,kynorm,kznorm,k_squared,k_module,k_physical,time,norm,delta;
45 double ave=0.0, var=0.0, gave, gvar;
46 char filename[LBLENGTH];
47 FILE *file;
48 MPI_Status status;
49
50 Ninplane=MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x * MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y;
51 planesize=Ninplane * sizeof(float);
52 plane=(float*)malloc(planesize);
53
54 if (!ThisTask)
55 {
56 strcpy(filename,"WhiteNoise");
57 file=fopen(filename,"r");
58 if (file==0x0)
59 {
60 printf("ERROR on Task 0: cannot find file WhiteNoise required by read_white_noise\n");
61 return 1;
62 }
63
64 fread(&dummy, 1, sizeof(int), file);
65 fread(&np1, 1, sizeof(int), file);
66 fread(&np2, 1, sizeof(int), file);
67 fread(&np3, 1, sizeof(int), file);
68 fread(&seed, 1, sizeof(int), file);
69 fread(&dummy, 1, sizeof(int), file);
70
71 if (np1 != MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x || np2 != MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y || np3 != MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z)
72 {
73 printf("ERROR on Task 0: WhiteNoise file has wrong dimensions: %d %d %d\n",np1,np2,np3);
74 return 1;
75 }
76 }
77
78 for (gz=0; gz<MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z; gz++)
79 {
80 /* Task 0 reads the plane */
81 if (!ThisTask)
82 {
83 fread(&dummy,1,sizeof(int),file);
84 if (dummy != planesize)
85 {
86 printf("ERROR on Task 0: mis-matched record size for file WhiteNoise, I expected %d but obtained %d\n",
87 (int)planesize, dummy);
88 return 1;
89 }
90
91 fread(plane, Ninplane, sizeof(float), file);
92 fread(&dummy,1,sizeof(int),file);
93
94 printf("Task 0 has read plane %d\n",gz);
95 }
96
97 /* each task writes into an int variable either 0 or its task number if the plane belongs to it */
98 if (gz>=MyGrids[0].GSstart_z && gz<MyGrids[0].GSstart_z + MyGrids[0].GSlocal_z)
99 dummy=ThisTask;
100 else
101 dummy=0;
102
103 /* This way the variable Task (for Task 0) contains the task that must receive the plane */
104 MPI_Reduce(&dummy, &Task, 1, MPI_INT, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
105
106 if (!ThisTask) /* Task 0 either stores the data or sends them to Task */
107 {
108 printf("The plane will be stored by Task %d\n",Task);
109
110 if (Task)
111 MPI_Send(plane, planesize, MPI_BYTE, Task, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
112 else
113 {
114 for (i=0; i<Ninplane; i++)
115 {
116 ave+=plane[i];
117 var+=plane[i]*plane[i];
118 }
119 lz=gz-MyGrids[0].GSstart_z;
120 for (ly=0; ly<MyGrids[0].GSlocal_y; ly++)
121 for (lx=0; lx<MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x; lx++)
122 *(rvector_fft[0] + lx + (MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x + MyGrids[0].off) * (ly + lz * MyGrids[0].GSlocal_y)) =
123 *(plane + lx + MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x * ly);
124
125 }
126 }
127 else /* other tasks receive the data and store them if dummy>0 */
128 {
129 if (dummy==ThisTask)
130 {
131 MPI_Recv(plane, planesize, MPI_BYTE, 0, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
132 for (i=0; i<Ninplane; i++)
133 {
134 ave+=plane[i];
135 var+=plane[i]*plane[i];
136 }
137 lz=gz-MyGrids[0].GSstart_z;
138 for (ly=0; ly<MyGrids[0].GSlocal_y; ly++)
139 for (lx=0; lx<MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x; lx++)
140 *(rvector_fft[0] + lx + (MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x + MyGrids[0].off) * (ly + lz * MyGrids[0].GSlocal_y)) =
141 *(plane + lx + MyGrids[0].GSlocal_x * ly);
142 }
143 }
144 }
145
146 MPI_Reduce(&ave, &gave, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
147 MPI_Reduce(&var, &gvar, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
148 if (!ThisTask)
149 {
150 gave /= (double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x*(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y*(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z;
151 gvar = sqrt(gvar/((double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x*(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y*(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z));
152 printf("Average and variance of white noise: %f, %f\n",gave,gvar);
153 }
154
155 free(plane);
156
157
158 if (!ThisTask)
159 printf("[%s] read_white_noise: starting fft\n",fdate());
160
161 time = forward_transform(0);
162
163 if (!ThisTask)
164 printf("[%s] read_white_noise: done fft, cputime = %f\n",fdate(),time);
165
166 cputime.fft+=time;
167
168
169 /* loop on the cvector to fix the power spectrum */
170 /* k vectors */
171 kxnorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x;
172 kynorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y;
173 kznorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z;
174
175 /* Nyquist frequencies */
176 nxhalf = MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x/2;
177 nyhalf = MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y/2;
178 nzhalf = MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z/2;
179
180 norm = 1.0/pow(params.InterPartDist, 3.0);
181
182 for (local_z = 0; local_z < MyGrids[0].GSlocal_k_z; local_z++)
183 {
184 izz = local_z + MyGrids[0].GSstart_k_z;
185 if (local_z > nzhalf)
186 izz -= MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z;
187 kz = kznorm*izz;
188
189 for (local_y = 0; local_y < MyGrids[0].GSlocal_k_y; local_y++)
190 {
191 iyy = local_y + MyGrids[0].GSstart_k_y;
192 if (iyy > nyhalf)
193 iyy -= MyGrids[0].GSglobal_y;
194 ky = kynorm*iyy;
195
196 for (local_x = 0; local_x <= nxhalf; local_x++)
197 {
198 ixx = local_x;
199 kx = kxnorm*ixx;
200
201 k_squared = kx*kx + ky*ky + kz*kz;
202 k_module = sqrt(k_squared);
203 k_physical = k_module / params.InterPartDist;
204
205 /* corresponding index of real part in vector (imaginary in index + 1) */
206 index = 1 + 2*local_x + (MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x+MyGrids[0].off)
207 *(local_z + local_y* MyGrids[0].GSglobal_z);
208
209 if (k_squared > 0)
210 delta = sqrt(norm * PowerSpectrum(k_physical) *
211 exp(-pow(k_module/MyGrids[0].upper_k_cutoff,16.0) ) );
212 else
213 delta = 0.0;
214
215 (cvector_fft[0][index/2])[0] *= delta;
216 (cvector_fft[0][index/2])[1] *= delta;
217
218 }
219 }
220 }
221
222 write_from_cvector(0,kdensity[0]);
223
224 return 0;
225
226}
227
228#endif
PowerSpectrum
double PowerSpectrum(double k)
Definition cosmo.c:958
write_from_cvector
void write_from_cvector(int ThisGrid, double *vector)
Definition fmax-fftw.c:304

Definition pinocchio.h:371

Definition pinocchio.h:257

Definition pinocchio.h:284

  • Generated by 1.9.8
